name: Display Advertising
description: Plans, launches, and optimizes banner and display ad campaigns across programmatic networks, publisher sites, and retargeting platforms to build brand awareness and drive conversions.

variables.name: campaign_objective
variables.description: Campaign goal: brand awareness, consideration, or conversion

variables.name: target_audience
variables.description: Targeting parameters: demographics, interests, behaviors, retargeting lists

variables.name: key_metrics
variables.description: Primary KPIs: CTR, CPM, VTR, CPA, ROAS
